art_market.global_sales_outlook: Global art market reached $59.6B in 2025 (+2% transactions); 43% of dealers expect sales improvement in 2026. Focus remains on the upcoming Art Basel HK (March 27-29, previews March 25-26).
art_market.key_trends: Market restructuring continues amid geopolitical shifts and rising operational costs. Postwar and Contemporary art remains a key sector, Modern art reversed a 3-year decline (+9%).
art_market.recent_events: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 preparations finalized; features 240 galleries from 41 countries; debuts 'Zero 10' digital art initiative.

stock_market.market_sentiment: Sentiment remains tentative amidst geopolitical uncertainty and evolving Iran-US relations.
stock_market.key_factors: Geopolitical de-escalation optimism vs. denials; market volatility awaiting further updates.
